Green leafy vegetables, legumes, nuts and liver are good sources of folates. Many of the vegetables and fruits have low calories (Annexure 6). Large intake of low calorie vegetables and fruits can help in reducing calories in diet and help in obesity management. On the other hand vegetables like colocasia, potato, tapioca, yam, sweet potato and fruits like banana, avocado pear (215 Kcal) and mahua (111 Kcal) have more than 100 kcal per 100gram (Annexure 7).
